title: Croatian Beef Stew
description: Hearty beef stew with a rich flavor profile, perfect for a cold winter night.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove from pot and set aside.
Add onion and garlic to pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add carrots and potatoes to pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add browned beef back to pot, along with paprika, pepper, and salt. Stir to combine.
Add beef broth and water to pot, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 hours, or until beef is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
